<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Casa Libre – Bioprotect | Insecticida Natural</title>
<meta name="description" content="Bioprotect de Casa Libre: insecticida natural con ingredientes de origen natural. Seguro para tu familia y mascotas. Elimina cucarachas, hormigas, moscas y más. ¡A solo $55!">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --green-dark: #1a5c2a;
    --green-mid: #2e8b47;
    --green-light: #4caf50;
    --green-pale: #e8f5e9;
    --green-accent: #76c442;
    --orange: #f57c00;
    --orange-light: #ff9800;
    --cream: #fafdf5;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --text-dark: #1a2e1a;
    --text-mid: #3a5a3a;
    --text-light: #5a7a5a;
    --shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(30,90,40,0.12);
    --shadow-lg: 0 8px 48px rgba(30,90,40,0.18);
    --radius: 20px;
    --radius-sm: 12px;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    background: var(--cream);
    color: var(--text-dark);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ===== NAV ===== */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 1000;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(76,175,80,0.15);
    padding: 0 5%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    height: 68px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(30,90,40,0.08);
  }

  .nav-logo {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .nav-logo-icon {
    width: 42px;
    height: 42px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-mid), var(--green-accent));
    border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 22px;
  }

  .nav-logo-text {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .nav-logo-sub {
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    color: var(--green-mid);
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    display: block;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 28px;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    text-decoration: none;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--green-mid); }

  .nav-cta {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-mid), var(--green-accent));
    color: white !important;
    padding: 10px 22px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(46,139,71,0.3);
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s !important;
  }

  .nav-cta:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(46,139,71,0.4) !important;
    color: white !important;
  }

  .hamburger {
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    padding: 4px;
  }

  .hamburger span {
    display: block;
    width: 26px;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--green-dark);
    border-radius: 3px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }

  /* ===== HERO ===== */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding-top: 68px;
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, #0d3d1a 0%, #1a5c2a 40%, #2e8b47 80%, #4caf50 100%);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .hero-bg-circles {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .hero-circle {
    position: absolute;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  }

  .hero-circle-1 { width: 600px; height: 600px; top: -200px; right: -200px; }
  .hero-circle-2 { width: 400px; height: 400px; bottom: -150px; left: -100px; }
  .hero-circle-3 { width: 200px; height: 200px; top: 40%; left: 30%; }

  .hero-content {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 80px 5%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 60px;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    color: #c8f0c8;
    padding: 8px 18px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    animation: fadeInDown 0.8s ease;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    color: white;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    animation: fadeInDown 0.9s ease;
  }

  .hero-title .accent {
    color: var(--green-accent);
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    animation: fadeInDown 1s ease;
  }

  .hero-pills {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    animation: fadeInDown 1.1s ease;
  }

  .pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    color: white;
    padding: 7px 16px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  }

  .hero-cta-group {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeInDown 1.2s ease;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--orange), var(--orange-light));
    color: white;
    padding: 16px 32px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(245,124,0,0.4);
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .btn-primary:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(245,124,0,0.5);
  }

  .btn-secondary {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    color: white;
    padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-decoration: none;
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-secondary:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
  }

  .hero-image-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    animation: fadeInRight 1s ease;
  }

  .hero-image-glow {
    position: absolute;
    inset: -30px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(118,196,66,0.25) 0%, transparent 70%);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  .hero-image {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 520px;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    object-fit: cover;
  }

  .hero-price-badge {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 20px;
    left: -20px;
    background: white;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 16px 24px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    z-index: 2;
    animation: floatBadge 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  .hero-price-badge .price-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-light); font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
  .hero-price-badge .price-value { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2rem; color: var(--orange); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; }
  .hero-price-badge .price-ml { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-light); font-weight: 600; }

  /* ===== SOCIAL PROOF BAR ===== */
  .proof-bar {
    background: var(--green-dark);
    padding: 18px 5%;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 60px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .proof-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .proof-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; }

  /* ===== SECTIONS ===== */
  section { padding: 80px 5%; }

  .section-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--green-pale);
    color: var(--green-mid);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3.5vw, 2.8rem);
    color: var(--green-dark);
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .section-sub {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.7;
    max-width: 600px;
  }

  .container {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ===== BENEFITS ===== */
  .benefits { background: var(--cream); }

  .benefits-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 56px; }
  .benefits-header .section-sub { margin: 0 auto; }

  .benefits-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 28px;
  }

  .benefit-card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 36px 28px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    border: 1px solid rgba(76,175,80,0.1);
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .benefit-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 4px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green-mid), var(--green-accent));
  }

  .benefit-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
  }

  .benefit-icon {
    width: 64px;
    height: 64px;
    background: var(--green-pale);
    border-radius: 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 2rem;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .benefit-card h3 {
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .benefit-card p {
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.65;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
  }

  /* ===== PRODUCT FEATURES ===== */
  .features { background: white; }

  .features-inner {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .features-image {
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
  }

  .features-image img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }

  .features-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; }

  .feature-item {
    display: flex;
    gap: 18px;
    align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }

  .feature-item:hover { background: var(--green-pale); }

  .feature-num {
    min-width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-mid), var(--green-accent));
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: white;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: 1rem;
  }

  .feature-item h4 {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .feature-item p {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  /* ===== INSECTS ===== */
  .insects { background: var(--green-dark); }

  .insects-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 48px; }
  .insects-header .section-tag { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: #a8e6a8; }
  .insects-header .section-title { color: white; }
  .insects-header .section-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin: 0 auto; }

  .insects-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .insect-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 32px 20px;
    text-align: center;
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  }

  .insect-card:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
  }

  .insect-emoji { font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 16px; display: block; }

  .insect-card h4 {
    color: white;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .insect-card p {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* ===== GALLERY ===== */
  .gallery { background: var(--cream); }
  .gallery-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 48px; }

  .gallery-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .gallery-item {
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    position: relative;
  }

  .gallery-item:hover { transform: scale(1.02); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); }

  .gallery-item img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }

  .gallery-item:first-child {
    grid-column: 1 / 3;
    aspect-ratio: 16/9;
  }

  /* ===== HOW TO USE ===== */
  .how { background: white; }
  .how-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 56px; }

  .steps-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 36px;
    position: relative;
  }

  .steps-grid::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 52px;
    left: calc(50% - 33.33%);
    right: calc(50% - 33.33%);
    height: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green-mid), var(--green-accent));
    z-index: 0;
  }

  .step-card {
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .step-circle {
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-mid), var(--green-accent));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    margin: 0 auto 24px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(46,139,71,0.3);
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }

  .step-card:hover .step-circle { transform: scale(1.08); }

  .step-card h4 {
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .step-card p {
    color: var(--text-light);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    line-height: 1.65;
    max-width: 220px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ===== INGREDIENTS ===== */
  .ingredients { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8f5e9, #f1f8f1); }
  .ingredients-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 48px; }

  .ingredients-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .ingredient-card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 28px 16px;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    border: 1px solid rgba(76,175,80,0.12);
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }

  .ingredient-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }

  .ingredient-emoji { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 14px; display: block; }

  .ingredient-card h4 {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .ingredient-card p {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* ===== COMPARISON ===== */
  .comparison { background: var(--cream); }
  .comparison-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 48px; }

  .comparison-table {
    background: white;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
  }

  .comparison-table th {
    padding: 20px 28px;
    text-align: left;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .comparison-table th:first-child { background: var(--green-pale); color: var(--green-dark); }
  .comparison-table th:nth-child(2) { background: var(--green-dark); color: white; width: 200px; text-align: center; }
  .comparison-table th:last-child { background: #fff3e0; color: var(--orange); width: 200px; text-align: center; }

  .comparison-table td {
    padding: 16px 28px;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  }

  .comparison-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
  .comparison-table tr:hover td { background: rgba(76,175,80,0.03); }

  .comparison-table td:nth-child(2),
  .comparison-table td:last-child { text-align: center; font-size: 1.3rem; }

  .check { color: var(--green-light); }
  .cross { color: #e53935; }

  /* ===== TESTIMONIALS ===== */
  .testimonials { background: white; }
  .testimonials-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 48px; }

  .testimonials-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .testimonial-card {
    background: var(--green-pale);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 32px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(76,175,80,0.12);
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
  }

  .testimonial-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
  }

  .testimonial-stars { color: #ffc107; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 16px; letter-spacing: 2px; }

  .testimonial-text {
    font-size: 0.98rem;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .testimonial-author {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .author-avatar {
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-mid), var(--green-accent));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: white;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 1rem;
  }

  .author-name { font-weight: 800; color: var(--green-dark); font-size: 0.9rem; }
  .author-loc { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-light); }

  /* ===== FAQ ===== */
  .faq { background: var(--cream); }
  .faq-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 48px; }

  .faq-list { max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }

  .faq-item {
    background: white;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    border: 1px solid rgba(76,175,80,0.12);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(30,90,40,0.06);
  }

  .faq-question {
    width: 100%;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    padding: 20px 24px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    text-align: left;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    gap: 16px;
  }

  .faq-question:hover { background: var(--green-pale); }

  .faq-arrow {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    color: var(--green-mid);
  }

  .faq-item.open .faq-arrow { transform: rotate(180deg); }

  .faq-answer {
    max-height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height 0.4s ease;
  }

  .faq-answer-inner {
    padding: 0 24px 20px;
    color: var(--text-light);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* ===== CONTACT / PURCHASE ===== */
  .purchase {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-dark), var(--green-mid));
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .purchase::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 80% 50%, rgba(118,196,66,0.15), transparent 60%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .purchase-inner {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .purchase-info h2 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3rem);
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .purchase-info p {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  .purchase-price-block {
    display: flex;
    align-items: baseline;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .purchase-currency { font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--orange-light); font-weight: 800; }
  .purchase-amount { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 4.5rem; color: white; line-height: 1; }
  .purchase-volume { font-size: 0.9rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-weight: 600; }

  .purchase-contact {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .contact-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 28px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  }

  .contact-card h3 {
    color: white;
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .form-group { margin-bottom: 16px; }

  .form-group label {
    display: block;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .form-group input,
  .form-group textarea {
    width: 100%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    padding: 12px 16px;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: white;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
    outline: none;
  }

  .form-group input::placeholder,
  .form-group textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); }

  .form-group input:focus,
  .form-group textarea:focus {
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  }

  .form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 100px; }

  .btn-whatsapp {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 10px;
    background: #25D366;
    color: white;
    padding: 14px 24px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    width: 100%;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37,211,102,0.4);
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-whatsapp:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(37,211,102,0.5);
  }

  .contact-options {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .contact-link {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    padding: 12px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }

  .contact-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }

  /* ===== FOOTER ===== */
  footer {
    background: #0d1f0d;
    padding: 56px 5% 32px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  }

  .footer-grid {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 48px;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }

  .footer-brand .nav-logo-text { color: #a8e6a8; font-size: 1.5rem; }
  .footer-brand .nav-logo-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-bottom: 16px; }

  .footer-brand p {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    line-height: 1.65;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .social-links { display: flex; gap: 12px; }

  .social-link {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }

  .social-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  .footer-col h4 {
    color: white;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .footer-col ul { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }

  .footer-col ul li a {
    text-decoration: none;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .footer-col ul li a:hover { color: var(--green-accent); }

  .footer-col ul li span { font-size: 0.9rem; }

  .footer-bottom {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding-top: 24px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  /* ===== FLOAT CTA ===== */
  .float-cta {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 28px;
    right: 28px;
    z-index: 900;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
    align-items: flex-end;
  }

  .float-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    text-decoration: none;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  }

  .float-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }

  .float-wa { background: #25D366; }
  .float-phone { background: var(--green-dark); font-size: 1.3rem; }

  /* ===== ANIMATIONS ===== */
  @keyframes fadeInDown {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-24px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes fadeInRight {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(40px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.05); }
  }

  @keyframes floatBadge {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-8px); }
  }

  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(32px);
    transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
  }

  .reveal.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  /* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
  @media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .features-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .purchase-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 36px; }
    .ingredients-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
    .insects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .nav-links { display: none; flex-direction: column; position: absolute; top: 68px; left: 0; right: 0; background: white; padding: 20px 5%; gap: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }
    .nav-links.open { display: flex; }
    .hamburger { display: flex; }

    .hero-content { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; text-align: center; }
    .hero-image-wrapper { order: -1; }
    .hero-pills { justify-content: center; }
    .hero-cta-group { justify-content: center; }
    .hero-price-badge { left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); bottom: -20px; }

    .benefits-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .gallery-item:first-child { grid-column: auto; aspect-ratio: 4/3; }
    .steps-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .steps-grid::before { display: none; }
    .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .comparison-table th:last-child { display: none; }
    .comparison-table td:last-child { display: none; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
    .proof-bar { gap: 24px; }
    .insects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .ingredients-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .contact-options { flex-direction: column; }
    .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
    <div class="nav-logo-icon">🏠</div>
    <div>
      <span class="nav-logo-text">Casa Libre</span>
      <span class="nav-logo-sub">Hogar Seguro, Familia Tranquila</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
    <li><a href="#beneficios">Beneficios</a></li>
    <li><a href="#ingredientes">Ingredientes</a></li>
    <li><a href="#galeria">Galería</a></li>
    <li><a href="#faq">FAQ</a></li>
    <li><a href="#comprar" class="nav-cta">¡Comprar Ahora!</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" aria-label="Menú">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg-circles">
    <div class="hero-circle hero-circle-1"></div>
    <div class="hero-circle hero-circle-2"></div>
    <div class="hero-circle hero-circle-3"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-text">
      <div class="hero-badge">🌿 Insecticida Natural · Baja Toxicidad</div>
      <h1 class="hero-title">
        Protege tu hogar,<br>
        <span class="accent">naturalmente.</span>
      </h1>
      <p class="hero-subtitle">
        Bioprotect es la solución natural contra plagas domésticas. Ahuyenta, elimina y previene cucarachas, hormigas y moscas — sin químicos agresivos, seguro para toda tu familia.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-pills">
        <span class="pill">✅ Seguro para niños y mascotas</span>
        <span class="pill">🌍 Eco-amigable</span>
        <span class="pill">🔁 Previene su regreso</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-cta-group">
        <a href="#comprar" class="btn-primary">🛒 Comprar Ahora — $55</a>
        <a href="#como-usar" class="btn-secondary">Ver cómo usarlo</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-image-wrapper">
      <div class="hero-image-glow"></div>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Casa Libre Bioprotect Insecticida Natural 500ml" class="hero-image">
      <div class="hero-price-badge">
        <div class="price-label">precio especial</div>
        <div class="price-value">$55</div>
        <div class="price-ml">500 ml</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROOF BAR -->
<div class="proof-bar">
  <div class="proof-item"><span class="proof-icon">🌿</span> Ingredientes de origen natural</div>
  <div class="proof-item"><span class="proof-icon">🛡️</span> Seguro para familia y mascotas</div>
  <div class="proof-item"><span class="proof-icon">🌍</span> Amigable con el medio ambiente</div>
  <div class="proof-item"><span class="proof-icon">🔁</span> Previene su regreso</div>
  <div class="proof-item"><span class="proof-icon">💧</span> Baja toxicidad</div>
</div>

<!-- BENEFITS -->
<section class="benefits" id="beneficios">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="benefits-header reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">Por qué elegir Bioprotect</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">La diferencia natural</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Un insecticida que protege a tu familia al mismo tiempo que cuida el planeta. Sin compromisos.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="benefits-grid">
      <div class="benefit-card reveal">
        <div class="benefit-icon">🏡</div>
        <h3>Doble Efecto Protector</h3>
        <p>Ahuyenta y elimina insectos con sus aromas naturales. El ácido bórico contribuye a eliminarlos y elimina rastros de feromonas para evitar su regreso.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal">
        <div class="benefit-icon">👶</div>
        <h3>Seguro para toda tu familia</h3>
        <p>Formulado con baja toxicidad, es seguro para niños, adultos mayores y mascotas. Sin los riesgos de los insecticidas químicos convencionales.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal">
        <div class="benefit-icon">🌱</div>
        <h3>Ingredientes Naturales</h3>
        <p>Laurel, vinagre blanco, cítricos, aceite esencial de árbol de té y ácido bórico. Ingredientes biodegradables que respetan el entorno.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal">
        <div class="benefit-icon">♻️</div>
        <h3>Envase Sustentable</h3>
        <p>Envasado en materiales reciclables y reutilizables que minimizan el impacto ambiental. Diseño práctico y fácil de usar.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal">
        <div class="benefit-icon">💰</div>
        <h3>Precio Accesible</h3>
        <p>Calidad premium al alcance de todos. A solo $55 pesos por frasco de 500 ml, con un margen de efectividad que compite con las grandes marcas.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="benefit-card reveal">
        <div class="benefit-icon">🌿</div>
        <h3>Aroma Agradable</h3>
        <p>A diferencia de los insecticidas químicos, Bioprotect tiene un aroma fresco y natural, creando un ambiente limpio y agradable en tu hogar.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FEATURES -->
<section class="features" id="producto">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="features-inner">
      <div class="features-image reveal">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Casa Libre Bioprotect - Protege tu hogar de forma natural" style="max-height:500px; width:100%; object-fit:cover;">
      </div>
      <div class="reveal">
        <div class="section-tag">Características del producto</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Diseñado para tu tranquilidad</h2>
        <div class="features-list">
          <div class="feature-item">
            <div class="feature-num">1</div>
            <div>
              <h4>Triple Acción: Ahuyenta · Elimina · Previene</h4>
              <p>No solo mata insectos: los aleja con aromas naturales y previene futuras infestaciones al eliminar sus rastros de feromonas.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-item">
            <div class="feature-num">2</div>
            <div>
              <h4>Fórmula Biodegradable</h4>
              <p>Todos los ingredientes son de origen natural y se degradan sin contaminar suelo, agua ni aire.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-item">
            <div class="feature-num">3</div>
            <div>
              <h4>Aplicación Fácil y Práctica</h4>
              <p>Presentación en spray de 500 ml. Solo agita, aplica en las zonas afectadas y protege. Sin complicaciones.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-item">
            <div class="feature-num">4</div>
            <div>
              <h4>Fabricado con Responsabilidad Social</h4>
              <p>Producto de emprendimiento local mexicano, producido en León, Guanajuato, comprometido con la salud y el bienestar comunitario.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- INSECTS -->
<section class="insects">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="insects-header reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">Efectivo contra</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Elimina las plagas más comunes</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Bioprotect actúa sobre los insectos más frecuentes en el hogar mexicano.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="insects-grid reveal">
      <div class="insect-card">
        <span class="insect-emoji">🪳</span>
        <h4>Cucarachas</h4>
        <p>Elimina y repele con el aroma del laurel y el ácido bórico.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="insect-card">
        <span class="insect-emoji">🐜</span>
        <h4>Hormigas</h4>
        <p>El vinagre destruye sus rastros de feromonas cortando el camino.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="insect-card">
        <span class="insect-emoji">🪰</span>
        <h4>Moscas</h4>
        <p>Los cítricos y aceite de árbol de té crean una barrera natural.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="insect-card">
        <span class="insect-emoji">🦟</span>
        <h4>Otros insectos</h4>
        <p>Efectivo contra una amplia variedad de plagas domésticas comunes.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALLERY -->
<section class="gallery" id="galeria">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="gallery-header reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">Galería</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Conoce Bioprotect</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">La presentación natural que tu hogar merece.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-grid reveal">
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Casa Libre Bioprotect publicidad">
      </div>
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Casa Libre Bioprotect banner">
      </div>
      <div class="gallery-item">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Bioprotect insecticida natural 500ml">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HOW TO USE -->
<section class="how" id="como-usar">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="how-header reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">Instrucciones de uso</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Tres simples pasos</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Usar Bioprotect es tan fácil como 1, 2, 3. Sin pasos complicados, sin riesgos.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="steps-grid">
      <div class="step-card reveal">
        <div class="step-circle">🫧</div>
        <h4>1. Agita</h4>
        <p>Agita bien el frasco antes de cada uso para activar los ingredientes naturales.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card reveal">
        <div class="step-circle">💦</div>
        <h4>2. Aplica</h4>
        <p>Rocía en rincones, esquinas, bordes de muebles y zonas donde hayas visto insectos.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card reveal">
        <div class="step-circle">🛡️</div>
        <h4>3. Protege</h4>
        <p>Tu hogar queda protegido. Repite la aplicación periódicamente para mantener la barrera.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- INGREDIENTS -->
<section class="ingredients" id="ingredientes">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ingredients-header reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">Fórmula natural</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Ingredientes que cuidan</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Cada ingrediente fue seleccionado por sus propiedades naturales, seguridad y efectividad.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="ingredients-grid reveal">
      <div class="ingredient-card">
        <span class="ingredient-emoji">🌿</span>
        <h4>Laurel</h4>
        <p>Aroma intenso que repele cucarachas y moscas de forma natural.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="ingredient-card">
        <span class="ingredient-emoji">🍶</span>
        <h4>Vinagre Blanco</h4>
        <p>Elimina rastros de feromonas que orientan a las hormigas y cucarachas.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="ingredient-card">
        <span class="ingredient-emoji">🍋</span>
        <h4>Cítricos</h4>
        <p>Limón, naranja o toronja: compuestos naturales desagradables para las plagas.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="ingredient-card">
        <span class="ingredient-emoji">🌲</span>
        <h4>Aceite de Árbol de Té</h4>
        <p>Propiedades antimicrobianas y aroma fuerte que aleja insectos.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="ingredient-card">
        <span class="ingredient-emoji">🔬</span>
        <h4>Ácido Bórico</h4>
        <p>Agente de control de baja toxicidad. Elimina insectos por contacto.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- COMPARISON -->
<section class="comparison">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="comparison-header reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">¿Por qué Bioprotect?</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">La comparación habla por sí sola</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="reveal" style="overflow-x:auto;">
      <table class="comparison-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Característica</th>
            <th>🌿 Bioprotect</th>
            <th>⚗️ Insecticidas Químicos</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td><strong>Ingredientes naturales</strong></td>
            <td class="check">✅</td>
            <td class="cross">❌</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td><strong>Seguro para niños y mascotas</strong></td>
            <td class="check">✅</td>
            <td class="cross">❌</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td><strong>Amigable con el medio ambiente</strong></td>
            <td class="check">✅</td>
            <td class="cross">❌</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td><strong>Previene el regreso de plagas</strong></td>
            <td class="check">✅</td>
            <td class="cross">❌</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td><strong>Aroma agradable</strong></td>
            <td class="check">✅</td>
            <td class="cross">❌</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td><strong>Envase reciclable</strong></td>
            <td class="check">✅</td>
            <td class="cross">❌</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td><strong>Precio accesible ($55)</strong></td>
            <td class="check">✅</td>
            <td style="text-align:center">⚠️</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td><strong>Baja toxicidad</strong></td>
            <td class="check">✅</td>
            <td class="cross">❌</td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TESTIMONIALS -->
<section class="testimonials">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="testimonials-header reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">Testimonios</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Lo que dicen nuestros clientes</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="testimonials-grid">
      <div class="testimonial-card reveal">
        <div class="testimonial-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="testimonial-text">"¡Increíble! Llevaba meses con problemas de hormigas y en una semana desaparecieron. Lo mejor es que no tuve que preocuparme por mis hijos ni por mi perro."</p>
        <div class="testimonial-author">
          <div class="author-avatar">ML</div>
          <div>
            <div class="author-name">María López</div>
            <div class="author-loc">León, Guanajuato</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="testimonial-card reveal">
        <div class="testimonial-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="testimonial-text">"Nunca pensé que un producto natural fuera tan efectivo. Las cucarachas desaparecieron y el olor es agradable, no como los otros sprays que me daban dolor de cabeza."</p>
        <div class="testimonial-author">
          <div class="author-avatar">CR</div>
          <div>
            <div class="author-name">Carlos Ramírez</div>
            <div class="author-loc">Silao, Guanajuato</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="testimonial-card reveal">
        <div class="testimonial-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="testimonial-text">"Tengo una mamá de 75 años y dos gatos. Necesitaba algo que no les hiciera daño. Bioprotect fue la respuesta. Funciona de verdad y el precio es muy accesible."</p>
        <div class="testimonial-author">
          <div class="author-avatar">AP</div>
          <div>
            <div class="author-name">Ana Pérez</div>
            <div class="author-loc">León, Guanajuato</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FAQ -->
<section class="faq" id="faq">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="faq-header reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">Preguntas frecuentes</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Resolvemos tus dudas</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-list reveal">
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          ¿Es realmente seguro para niños y mascotas?
          <span class="faq-arrow">▼</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-answer">
          <div class="faq-answer-inner">Sí. Bioprotect está formulado con ingredientes de baja toxicidad y origen natural. A diferencia de los insecticidas químicos convencionales, no contiene compuestos que puedan ser peligrosos para personas o animales domésticos cuando se usa según las indicaciones. Siempre recomendamos no aplicar directamente sobre mascotas o alimentos.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          ¿Cuánto tiempo dura el efecto?
          <span class="faq-arrow">▼</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-answer">
          <div class="faq-answer-inner">El efecto varía según la superficie aplicada y el nivel de infestación. En general, recomendamos aplicar cada 7-14 días en zonas problemáticas para mantener una barrera efectiva y prevenir el regreso de las plagas. La eliminación de feromonas ayuda a un control más duradero.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          ¿Dónde lo puedo aplicar?
          <span class="faq-arrow">▼</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-answer">
          <div class="faq-answer-inner">Puedes aplicarlo en rincones, debajo de muebles, bordes de paredes, cocina, baño, alacenas, jardín y cualquier lugar donde hayas observado insectos. Evita aplicar sobre superficies de madera sin lavar y no lo uses en alimentos directamente.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          ¿Funciona contra todos los insectos?
          <span class="faq-arrow">▼</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-answer">
          <div class="faq-answer-inner">Bioprotect es especialmente efectivo contra cucarachas, hormigas y moscas — las plagas más comunes en el hogar. También actúa contra otros insectos rastreros y voladores. Para infestaciones severas, recomendamos acompañarlo con limpieza profunda de las zonas afectadas.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          ¿Puedo hacer pedidos al mayoreo?
          <span class="faq-arrow">▼</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-answer">
          <div class="faq-answer-inner">¡Sí! Ofrecemos precios especiales para pedidos al mayoreo, distribuidores y negocios. Contáctanos por WhatsApp o llámanos directamente para cotizar y acordar condiciones de entrega.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          ¿Cuánto tarda en llegar mi pedido?
          <span class="faq-arrow">▼</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-answer">
          <div class="faq-answer-inner">Para León y zona metropolitana, ofrecemos entrega el mismo día o al día siguiente. Para el resto de la república, el envío puede tardar 2-5 días hábiles dependiendo del destino. Coordinamos la entrega directamente por WhatsApp.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PURCHASE / CONTACT -->
<section class="purchase" id="comprar">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="purchase-inner">
      <div class="purchase-info reveal">
        <div class="section-tag" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#c8f0c8;">Pide el tuyo hoy</div>
        <h2>Tu hogar merece la mejor protección natural</h2>
        <p>Únete a cientos de familias en León y Guanajuato que ya confían en Bioprotect para mantener su hogar libre de plagas, de forma segura y responsable.</p>
        <div class="purchase-price-block">
          <span class="purchase-currency">$</span>
          <span class="purchase-amount">55</span>
          <div>
            <div class="purchase-volume">pesos / 500 ml</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-top:2px;">Precio especial de lanzamiento</div>

        </div>
        <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/ApjRSxcXCZwEg59D7?g_st=ac" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary" style="width:fit-content;margin-top:8px;">
          📍 Ver ubicación en Google Maps
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="purchase-contact reveal">
        <div class="contact-card">
          <h3>📦 Haz tu pedido</h3>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Tu nombre</label>
            <input type="text" placeholder="¿Cómo te llamas?" id="fname">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Teléfono / WhatsApp</label>
            <input type="tel" placeholder="Tu número de contacto" id="fphone">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>¿Cuántas unidades deseas?</label>
            <input type="number" placeholder="Ej: 2" min="1" id="fqty">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Mensaje (opcional)</label>
            <textarea placeholder="¿Alguna pregunta o indicación especial?" id="fmsg"></textarea>
          </div>
          <a href="#" class="btn-whatsapp" id="sendWa" onclick="sendWhatsApp(event)">
            <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413Z"/></svg>
            Pedir por WhatsApp
          </a>
          <div class="contact-options" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <a href="tel:5640386027" class="contact-link">📞 Llamar: 56 4038 6027</a>
            <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/ApjRSxcXCZwEg59D7?g_st=ac" target="_blank" class="contact-link">📍 Cómo llegar</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->

<!-- FLOATING CTA -->
<div class="float-cta">
  <a href="tel:5640386027" class="float-btn float-phone" title="Llamar">📞</a>
  <a href="https://wa.me/525640386027?text=Hola!%20Me%20interesa%20Bioprotect%20de%20Casa%20Libre.%20%C2%BFMe%20pueden%20dar%20m%C3%A1s%20informaci%C3%B3n?" class="float-btn float-wa" title="WhatsApp" target="_blank">
    <svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413Z"/></svg>
  </a>
</div>

<script>
// Hamburger
const ham = document.getElementById('hamburger');
const navLinks = document.getElementById('navLinks');
ham.addEventListener('click', () => navLinks.classList.toggle('open'));

// Close nav on link click
navLinks.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => {
  a.addEventListener('click', () => navLinks.classList.remove('open'));
});

// Reveal on scroll
const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach((entry, i) => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('visible'), 80);
      observer.unobserve(entry.target);
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
reveals.forEach(r => observer.observe(r));

// Stagger sibling reveals
document.querySelectorAll('.benefits-grid, .testimonials-grid, .gallery-grid, .insects-grid, .ingredients-grid, .steps-grid').forEach(grid => {
  grid.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach((child, i) => {
    child.style.transitionDelay = (i * 0.08) + 's';
  });
});

// FAQ
function toggleFaq(btn) {
  const item = btn.closest('.faq-item');
  const isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item').forEach(i => {
    i.classList.remove('open');
    i.querySelector('.faq-answer').style.maxHeight = '0';
  });
  if (!isOpen) {
    item.classList.add('open');
    const answer = item.querySelector('.faq-answer');
    answer.style.maxHeight = answer.scrollHeight + 'px';
  }
}

// WhatsApp form
function sendWhatsApp(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const name = document.getElementById('fname').value || 'Cliente';
  const phone = document.getElementById('fphone').value || '';
  const qty = document.getElementById('fqty').value || '1';
  const msg = document.getElementById('fmsg').value || '';
  const text = `Hola! Me llamo ${name}${phone ? ', mi número es ' + phone : ''}. Quiero pedir ${qty} unidad(es) de Bioprotect Casa Libre.${msg ? ' ' + msg : ''} ¿Me pueden ayudar?`;
  const url = `https://wa.me/525640386027?text=${encodeURIComponent(text)}`;
  window.open(url, '_blank');
}

// Nav scroll effect
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const nav = document.querySelector('nav');
  if (window.scrollY > 80) {
    nav.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 28px rgba(30,90,40,0.15)';
  } else {
    nav.style.boxShadow = '0 2px 20px rgba(30,90,40,0.08)';
  }
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
